content:
We need to get the first page working properly.
The first page to be opened is supposed to be intro-AboutThisManual.adoc or intro-AboutThisManual.html

There is a redirect happening somewhere that I have not been able to determine the source, I've looked in the antora.yml and in other yml and I don't know where it comes from, but the top index.page in ocpn-manuals (where the pages are generated from) in C:\Users\Rick\Documents\GitHub\ocpn-manuals\docs\index.html

Has this redirect which is not correct and refers to developer-guide!

<!DOCTYPE html>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://leamas.github.io/ocpn-manuals/ocpn-dev-manual/5.3.1/developer_guide.html">
<script>location="ocpn-dev-manual/5.3.1/developer_guide.html"</script>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=ocpn-dev-manual/5.3.1/developer_guide.html">
<meta name="robots" content="noindex">
<title>Redirect Notice</title>
<h1>Redirect Notice</h1>
<p>The page you requested has been relocated to <a href="ocpn-dev-manual/5.3.1/developer_guide.html">https://leamas.github.io/ocpn-manuals/ocpn-dev-manual/5.3.1/developer_guide.html</a>.</p>

Where do I fix this? Any ideas?
Are you referring to the docs generated by your own build-xxx.yml? Or the complete manual generated by ocpn-manuals?
This topic was moved here from #general > Startup Redirect by Alec Leamas.
